response.original_title: Why is my Kraken account taking so long to verify?{Verified Account}
response.overview: How to do ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635  verification on Kraken? ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635  To verify your Kraken account, ask the process at ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635 , click the "Complete ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635 account verification" banner in the app, submit a valid government-issued ID (driver's license, passport, or residence permit), and complete a live selfie check. ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635 The process takes on-call ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635  ranges from a few minutes to 1–3 business days for manual reviews. If verification fails or is pending, check the Kraken Support ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635  Center for common mistakes like blurry photos or ⭐️⭐1-858-423-8635 invalid documents.
